channel.title: GitHub Discovery
channel.description: Discover trending GitHub repos before they go viral

item.title: 🔥 QwenLM/Qwen-AgentWorld — 338⭐ (169.0/day)
item.description:
Qwen-AgentWorld: Language World Models for General Agents
Score: 100/100 | Language: Python

item.title: 🔥 BohemiaInteractive/CWR — 257⭐ (128.5/day)
item.description:
Arma: Cold War Assault Remastered Source Code Repository.
Score: 100/100 | Language: C

item.title: 🔥 krea-ai/krea-2 — 193⭐ (96.5/day)
item.description:
Official inference code for Krea 2
Score: 100/100 | Language: Python

item.title: 🔥 calesthio/OpenMontage — 19963⭐ (229.5/day)
item.description:
World's first open-source, agentic video production system. 12 pipelines, 52 tools, 500+ agent skills. Turn your AI coding assistant into a full video production studio.
Score: 96/100 | Language: Python

item.title: 🔥 ZhuLinsen/daily_stock_analysis — 48782⭐ (295.6/day)
item.description:
LLM 驱动的多市场股票智能分析系统：多源行情、实时新闻、决策看板与自动推送，支持零成本定时运行。 LLM-powered multi-market stock analysis system with multi-source market data, real-time news, decision dashboard, automated notifications, and cost-free scheduled runs.
Score: 96/100 | Language: Python

item.title: 🔥 HKUDS/AgentSpace — 365⭐ (182.5/day)
item.description:
"AgentSpace: Human + Agents. One Team. One Workspace"
Score: 100/100 | Language: TypeScript

item.title: 🔥 samasante/liquid-glass — 293⭐ (146.5/day)
item.description:
Apple-style Liquid Glass for the web — a headless React lens that refracts the live DOM in Safari, Firefox and Chrome. Zero dependencies.
Score: 100/100 | Language: TypeScript

item.title: 🔥 nova452/ComfyUI-ConditioningKrea2Rebalance — 205⭐ (205.0/day)
item.description:
A conditioning optimizer with per layer weighting that offers IP-Adapter-like features for Krea 2 along with bypassing the built in quality diluation from the trained safety filter and also works as a means to unfilter the model.
Score: 100/100 | Language: Python

item.description:

item.title: 🔥 sums001/Windows-Copilot-API — 434⭐ (144.7/day)
item.description:
Reverse engineered Windows Copilot into an OpenAI-compatible API. Access GPT-4 and GPT-5 models through a simple REST interface without API keys or billing.
Score: 100/100 | Language: Python

item.title: 🔥 raiyanyahya/recall — 360⭐ (120.0/day)
item.description:
